LanguageData.EM_DiggingZoneIsPolluted: Digging zone is polluted (Will yield ash)
LanguageData.EM_CommandAllowDiggingDesc: Enables or disables digging in this zone
LanguageData.EM_ChooseResourceDesc: Choose a material to dig for.
LanguageData.EM_DryingSpotNotWorking: Drying spot is currently not working.
LanguageData.EM_FiringSpotNotWorking: Firing spot is currently not working.
LanguageData.EM_RainIsRuiningBricks: Bricks are being ruined by rain.
LanguageData.EM_RainRuinedBricks: Bricks got destroyed due to rain.
